summary: Added a generated Chapter Spoils medallion shelf to the Path Map Chapter Archive so each selected chapter visibly earns proof, unlock, gate, service, task, and trace rewards from its actual event mix.

queries: achievement badges dashboard UX progression rewards best practices
game achievement badge UI design progression systems player motivation
gamification badges progress dashboard enterprise UX
pattern_notes: Achievement surfaces should reward meaningful progress states, not decorative noise.
Game progression is easier to understand when the current path, earned rewards, and locked rewards are visible together.
Faceted histories and timeline drilldowns benefit from a compact summary layer that tells operators what kind of work happened before they read individual records.

generated_asset.prompt: A 3x2 sprite sheet of six collectible achievement medallions for an agent-company path archive: proof seal, unlock coin, gate lock, service contract, task token, trace crystal. Polished 3D game UI medals, premium dark sci-fi operations dashboard, no text, no watermark.

ui_contract: Render Chapter Spoils inside the selected Chapter Archive record deck.
Derive six reward classes from the selected chapter: Proof Seal, Unlock Coin, Gate Lock, Service Writ, Task Token, and Trace Crystal.
Show earned state for nonzero chapter counts and locked state for zero-count rewards.
Use the generated 3x2 medallion sheet as real sprite art, not placeholder shapes.
Register the medallion sheet in Visual Asset Vault as a system asset.
Keep the shelf responsive with no clipped labels or horizontal overflow.

red_green.red: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_chapter_spoils.py -q failed before frontend wiring on missing function pathChapterSpoils.

browser_green_route.evidence: Rendered Chapter Spoils header '2 of 6 earned 06/15', six badges, Proof Seal 22, Unlock Coin 21, four locked rewards, correct sprite positions, generated asset background, no bad rectangles, and no horizontal overflow.

alternate_chapter.evidence: Selecting 06/14 showed '3 of 6 earned' with Unlock Coin 10, Service Writ 6, and Trace Crystal 5 earned while Proof, Gate, and Task stayed locked.

responsive.evidence: All tested viewports rendered one spoils shelf, six badges, generated medal backgrounds, no bad rectangles, no clipped spoils text, and no horizontal overflow.
